criteria.name: Functionality
criteria.description: The range and effectiveness of features offered by the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, and official websites.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: Ease of use, interface design, and overall user satisfaction.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app ratings, and usability studies.

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent and sophistication of AI technologies utilized within the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer notes, and technical documentation.

criteria.name: Popularity
criteria.description: Number of downloads, active users, and overall market presence.
criteria.sources: App store statistics, market analysis reports.

criteria.name: Cross-Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app across different operating systems and devices.
criteria.sources: App store listings and official websites.
